conservative.name: We Must Work Together!
conservative.requirements: Leadership trained, ally engaged with you. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The target ally may remove 2 recharge tokens from a Teamwork action card
The target ally may immediately recharge a Teamwork action card

boon.description: Add or remove 1 recharge token from this card
Allies engaged with you gain the Inspired condition while this card is recharging

bane.description: Allies engaged with you gain the Demoralised condition while this card is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: You have the entire situation under control. You may move the lowest PC tracking token on the initiative track up 1 space

reckless.name: We Must Work Together!
reckless.requirements: Leadership trained, ally engaged with you. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The target ally may remove 2 recharge tokens from a Teamwork action card
The target ally may immediately recharge a Teamwork action card

boon.description: Add or remove 1 recharge token from this card
Allies engaged with you gain the Inspired condition while this card is recharging

bane.description: Add or remove 2 recharge tokens from this card

sigmarsComet.description: Each ally engaged with you may choose to suffer 1 fatigue in order to move a hero token up 1 space on the initiative track. Each token can be moved only once with this action
